spacing_and_layout.philosophy: Technical Control Room - dense data but sharp, clear hierarchy.
spacing_and_layout.surface_strategy: Grid Borders (Technical Look). Use sharp edges, flat backgrounds, no shadows. Rely on 1px solid borders (border-white/10) to define sections.

buttons.primary: bg-white text-[#0A0A0C] hover:bg-gray-200 transition-colors duration-200 font-medium px-6 py-4 rounded-none border border-white
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent text-white border border-white/20 hover:border-white transition-colors duration-200 px-6 py-4 rounded-none

inputs.default: bg-[#121216] border border-white/20 text-white placeholder-gray-500 p-4 rounded-none focus:outline-none focus:border-white focus:ring-1 focus:ring-white transition-all font-mono text-lg

badges.safe: bg-[#00FF66]/10 text-[#00FF66] border border-[#00FF66]/30 px-3 py-1 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-mono
badges.warning: bg-[#FFD600]/10 text-[#FFD600] border border-[#FFD600]/30 px-3 py-1 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-mono
badges.danger: bg-[#FF3333]/10 text-[#FF3333] border border-[#FF3333]/30 px-3 py-1 text-xs uppercase tracking-wider font-mono

risk_meter.description: Large animated SVG circle. Stroke color changes based on risk (Green/Yellow/Red). Center contains massive animated number (0-100). Needs precise easing and glow via drop-shadow on the SVG path.

warning_banner.default: border-l-4 border-[#FF3333] bg-[#FF3333]/10 p-4 text-[#FF3333] font-mono text-sm flex items-start gap-3

motion.entrance: framer-motion staggered fade-in up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1)
motion.meter: SVG stroke-dashoffset animation with 1.5s ease-out duration

accessibility.focus_states: All interactive elements must have focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-white focus:ring-offset-2 focus:ring-offset-[#0A0A0C]
accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over colored backgrounds meets APCA standards. Use white text on dark red/green banners if needed.

images.description: Dark mode abstract cyber background. Use with heavy opacity overlay (e.g., bg-black/80) to ensure text legibility.
3D secure data node. Use as a floating graphic in the feature section or next to the risk meter explanation.
Abstract purple/black dice texture. Use sparingly as small texture fills in cards if needed.

instructions_to_main_agent: Strictly adhere to the monochrome base palette (#0A0A0C) with stark white text and sharp 1px borders.
Colors (Red, Yellow, Green) must ONLY be used for data states and risk indicators. Do not use them for decoration.
Do NOT use rounded corners (rounded-lg). Use 'rounded-none' everywhere to enforce the brutalist/terminal aesthetic.
The Risk Score Meter must be the visual centerpiece of the results page. Implement it as a custom SVG with an animated stroke-dashoffset in React.
Headings MUST use Azeret Mono. Body MUST use IBM Plex Sans. Import them via standard Google Fonts tags in index.html.
Never use generic standard cards with drop shadows. Use the Grid Borders concept (border border-white/10).
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
Input fields should be massive and commanding on the landing page (e.g., text-2xl, p-6).
